/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/llama-server.dir/server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/llama-server.dir/server-http.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/llama-server.dir/server-models.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-server  -Wl,-rpath,"/Users/AqibMumtaz/Aqib Mumtaz/BitLogix/qwen-asr-local/qwen3-asr-local/llama.cpp/build/bin" libserver-context.a ../../bin/libllama-common.0.0.7.dylib ../../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a ../../common/libllama-common-base.a ../../bin/libmtmd.0.0.7.dylib ../../bin/libllama.0.0.7.dylib ../../bin/libggml.0.11.0.dylib ../../bin/libggml-cpu.0.11.0.dylib ../../bin/libggml-blas.0.11.0.dylib ../../bin/libggml-base.0.11.0.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib -framework CoreFoundation -framework Security
